name: Air Max - USB-C Charger EU
summary: The Arizer Air Max can be powered with the Official Arizer Replacement USB-C Charger, ensuring efficient and reliable charging.
description: The Arizer Air Max can be powered with the Official Arizer Replacement USB-C Charger, ensuring efficient and reliable charging. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. Keeps your device charged and ready.
